 def spherical_pad(x, pad=1):

-    """Periodic pad in longitude (last dim), reflection pad in latitude (second-to-last dim)."""

     if pad <= 0:

         return x

-    # Periodic longitude padding

     left = x[..., :, -pad:]

     right = x[..., :, :pad]

     x = torch.cat([left, x, right], dim=-1)

-    # Reflection latitude padding

     top = x[..., :pad, :].flip(-2)

     bottom = x[..., -pad:, :].flip(-2)

     x = torch.cat([top, x, bottom], dim=-2)

-class ConvBlock(nn.Module):

+class SEBlock(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, channels, reduction=16):

         super().__init__()

-        ng = min(n_groups, out_ch)

-        while out_ch % ng != 0 and ng > 1:

+        mid = max(channels // reduction, 8)

             nn.GELU(),

-            SphericalConv2d(out_ch, out_ch),

     def forward(self, x):

-        return self.block(x)

+        b, c, _, _ = x.shape

+        s = self.net(x).view(b, c, 1, 1)

+        return x * s

+

+

+class ConvBlock(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, in_ch, out_ch, use_se=True):

+        super().__init__()

+        ng = min(8, out_ch)

+        while out_ch % ng != 0 and ng > 1:

+            ng -= 1

+        self.conv1 = SphericalConv2d(in_ch, out_ch)

+        self.gn1 = nn.GroupNorm(ng, out_ch)

+        self.conv2 = SphericalConv2d(out_ch, out_ch)

+        self.gn2 = nn.GroupNorm(ng, out_ch)

+        self.se = SEBlock(out_ch) if use_se and out_ch >= 32 else None

+

+    def forward(self, x):

+        x = F.gelu(self.gn1(self.conv1(x)))

+        x = self.gn2(self.conv2(x))

+        if self.se:

+            x = self.se(x)

+        x = F.gelu(x)

+        return x

+

+

+class SelfAttention2d(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, channels, num_heads=8):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.norm = nn.LayerNorm(channels)

+        self.mha = nn.MultiheadAttention(channels, num_heads, batch_first=True)

+

+    def forward(self, x):

+        B, C, H, W = x.shape

+        x_flat = x.permute(0, 2, 3, 1).reshape(B, H * W, C)

+        x_norm = self.norm(x_flat)

+        attn_out, _ = self.mha(x_norm, x_norm, x_norm)

+        x_flat = x_flat + attn_out

+        return x_flat.reshape(B, H, W, C).permute(0, 3, 1, 2)

 

 

 class WeatherUNet(nn.Module):

+        self.base_ch = base_ch

         ch1, ch2, ch3, ch4 = base_ch, base_ch * 2, base_ch * 4, base_ch * 8

 

-        # Encoder

         self.enc1 = ConvBlock(in_channels, ch1)

         self.enc2 = ConvBlock(ch1, ch2)

         self.enc3 = ConvBlock(ch2, ch3)

         self.enc4 = ConvBlock(ch3, ch4)

         self.pool = nn.AvgPool2d(2)

 

-        # Decoder

+        self.bottleneck_attn = SelfAttention2d(ch4, num_heads=min(16, ch4 // 64))

+

         self.up3 = nn.Upsample(scale_factor=2, mode='bilinear', align_corners=True)

         self.dec3 = ConvBlock(ch4 + ch3, ch3)

         self.up2 = nn.Upsample(scale_factor=2, mode='bilinear', align_corners=True)

-        # Output

         self.out_conv = SphericalConv2d(ch1, out_channels)

 

     def forward(self, x):

-        # x: [B, 6, 32, 64]

-        e1 = self.enc1(x)                          # [B, ch1, 32, 64]

-        e2 = self.enc2(self.pool(e1))                # [B, ch2, 16, 32]

-        e3 = self.enc3(self.pool(e2))                # [B, ch3, 8, 16]

-

-        d3 = self.dec3(torch.cat([self.up3(e4), e3], dim=1))  # [B, ch3, 8, 16]

-        d2 = self.dec2(torch.cat([self.up2(d3), e2], dim=1))  # [B, ch2, 16, 32]

-        d1 = self.dec1(torch.cat([self.up1(d2), e1], dim=1))  # [B, ch1, 32, 64]

-

-        return self.out_conv(d1)                     # [B, 2, 32, 64]

+        e1 = self.enc1(x)

+        e2 = self.enc2(self.pool(e1))

+        e3 = self.enc3(self.pool(e2))

+        e4 = self.enc4(self.pool(e3))

+        e4 = self.bottleneck_attn(e4)

+        d3 = self.dec3(torch.cat([self.up3(e4), e3], dim=1))

+        d2 = self.dec2(torch.cat([self.up2(d3), e2], dim=1))

+        d1 = self.dec1(torch.cat([self.up1(d2), e1], dim=1))

+        return self.out_conv(d1)

+class EMA:

+    def __init__(self, model, decay=0.999):

+        self.decay = decay

+        self.shadow = {}

+        for name, param in model.named_parameters():

+            if param.requires_grad:

+                self.shadow[name] = param.data.clone()

+

+    def update(self, model):

+        for name, param in model.named_parameters():

+            if param.requires_grad:

+                self.shadow[name] = self.decay * self.shadow[name] + (1 - self.decay) * param.data

+

+    def apply_shadow(self, model):

+        self.backup = {}

+        for name, param in model.named_parameters():

+            if param.requires_grad:

+                self.backup[name] = param.data.clone()

+                param.data = self.shadow[name].clone()

+

+    def restore(self, model):

+        for name, param in model.named_parameters():

+            if param.requires_grad:

+                param.data = self.backup[name]

+

+
